name: Dijon Steak, Cheese & Baked Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 Pounds Top Round Steak, diced 1/2 inch
3/4 Pound Hot Pepper Monterey Jack Cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the beef with white pepper and sear in 1/3 cup of smoking hot clarified butter. Remove and reserve.
2. In the same pot over medium heat, sauté the onion, garlic, and cumin in 3 tablespoons of clarified butter until the onion is soft.
3. Add the flour, incorporate it into the mixture.
4. Add the tomato and continue to sauté for 5 minutes.
5. Add the beef stock and reserved beef, then bring to a boil. Cover and simmer for 1 to 1.5 hours, until the beef is fork tender.
6. Finish the soup with the Dijon mustard, baked potato, and shredded cheese. Mix well and simmer uncovered for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Garnish with chopped cilantro.
